parts.text: Create a whiteboard presentation slide about Moore's Law. Style: Real whiteboard photo background with texture. Handwritten marker text using black, blue, and red colors only. Title: '摩尔定律 Moore's Law' in large black handwriting. Content: '每18-24个月，晶体管数量翻倍' in black. Formula: '性能 ↑ 成本 ↓' in red. Include hand-drawn microchip sketch and exponential growth curve. Professional classroom whiteboard look. 1920x1080 format.
